results.title: Spacex launched upgraded version of Starship spacecraft on maiden test flight
results.description: WASHINGTON, May 23: Elon Musk’s SpaceX has launched the upgraded version of the Starship spacecraft on its maiden test flight from the Starbase launch site in Boca Chica, Texas, according to a live broadcast of the event. SpaceX earlier on Friday canceled the first test launch of the upgraded Starship. Musk later said on X that the scrub was not due to a technical issue with the vehicle, explaining that a hydraulic pin securing the launch tower arm had not [...] The post Spacex launched upgraded version of Starship spacecraft on maiden test flight appeared first on Daily Excelsior .
